scope: Public-safe UX audit of the live Discord Control Tower during the first pilot intake, including channels, project intake, active-message threading and multi-project Kanban behavior.

observed_model.discord_role: owner cockpit and project conversation surface

findings.finding: The Discord forum shape can support more than one project, but production readiness still requires an idempotent bridge mapping per project.
findings.impact: Without a stable mapping, retries or repeated intake messages can create duplicate project cards or update the wrong topic.
findings.required_fix: Implement Factory Concierge Discord Bridge project mapping: one project key, one conversation thread, one forum card, retry-safe updates.

findings.finding: The owner now has one main intake door, but automatic project intake is not proven yet.
findings.impact: A paper can still require manual correction if the bridge does not create the project thread, project registry entry and Kanban card automatically.
findings.required_fix: Automate GERENTE intake so paper, long brief, new product or pilot creates or reuses the project surfaces.

findings.finding: Active bot messages do not yet have a proven runtime rule that creates or points to a thread.
findings.impact: A decision, access request, blocker or project conversation can still become loose chat if the bridge does not enforce the active-message threading rule.
findings.required_fix: Make every non-notification bot message create, continue or link a thread; exempt only dashboard, health and one-way notifications.

findings.finding: Structured approval interactions are not automated yet.
findings.impact: Approvals remain easy to misunderstand if they are handled as free-form chat instead of scoped runtime events.
findings.required_fix: Add Portuguese button/menu/modal approval flows and register the accepted or rejected event in Hermes.

findings.finding: Live runtime projection is not automated yet.
findings.impact: The Discord cockpit can become stale unless Hermes state updates dashboard, project cards, blockers, access requests, evidence and release channels.
findings.required_fix: Bridge Hermes runtime events into Discord updates with public-safe health evidence.

live_corrections: renamed the project intake lane to a project registry lane so the GERENTE remains the single owner intake door
updated the main dashboard to explain single-door intake, multi-project Kanban and active-message threading
updated the GERENTE channel guide to say papers and pilots start there
updated the project registry guide to say it is not a second paper submission channel
updated the Kanban guide to clarify one topic per project and retry-safe mapping
created a project conversation thread for the active pilot
created a visual forum card for the active pilot with the Entrada tag
next_required_actions: implement idempotent multi-project mapping in the Factory Concierge Discord Bridge
automate GERENTE project intake into project thread, project registry entry and Kanban forum card
enforce active-message threading for decisions, access, blockers, reviews, evidence discussions and project conversations
automate structured Portuguese approval interactions and Hermes registration
automate live runtime projection from Hermes to Discord
